meta.title: Ann Marlowe on the U.S. Withdrawal Deadline in Afghanistan
meta.description: Hudson Institute Visiting Fellow Ann Marlowe discussed the U.S. troop withdrawal deadline in Afghanistan. This discussion took place during Hudson's event "Can Counterinsurgency Work in Afghanistan?". More information can be found here: http://www.hudson.org/index.cfm?fuseaction=upcoming_events_list.
